title: Create: Cola Factory | Updated
description: Adds Coca Cola For the Create Mod! | Create 6.0+
body:

[![Discord](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsocial%2Fdiscord-plural_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://discord.gg/MfwHdXjPDB)


## Version 1.20.1 and older are discontinued!
# **About Create: Cola Factory**
**Create: Cola Factory** is an addon for the Create mod that adds Coca Cola and craftings using Create mod. Some of the key features of this addon include:

Coca Cola Cans (3 Variants): Full Can, Half Empty Can, Empty Can

Coca Cola Glass Bottles (3 Variants): Full Glass Bottle, Half Full Glass Bottle, Empty Glass Bottle

Coca Cola (Fluid): Used to fill bottles and cans with spout.

Coca Cola Zero: Coca Cola Without Sugar - Idea by abovearth

Carbon Dioxide (Gas): Used to create Coca Cola.

Burping (Effect): After drinking Coca Cola you will get Burping effect and you will burp for 30 seconds.

Toggle Burp (Gamerule): Gamerule to toggle burping after drinking cola


# Coca Cola Making Process:

1) Mix Water, Coco Beans and Sugar/Artificial Sweetener in heated basin to create Coca Cola Syrup
2) Mix the Syrup with water in heated basin to get Flat Coca Cola
3) Mix Limestone in Superheated basin to get Carbon Dioxide
4) Mix Flat Coca Cola with Carbon Dioxide to get COCA COLA!
5) Now you just need to fill Cans or Bottles with Coca Cola and you are done!

**If You Want to make video about my mod please add CreateColaFactory tag to the description.**
